description_long: This is a log-style house set on a gently sloped, snow-covered terrain with sparse, leafless trees surrounding it. The house features a prominent gable roof with deep eaves and a central entryway, flanked by a covered porch supported by wooden posts. The exterior is constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving it a rustic, cabin-like appearance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, with smaller windows on the sides. The house sits on a dark foundation, possibly stone or concrete, which contrasts with the lighter wood and snow. The surrounding landscape is open, with the house as the central focal point.
description: A rustic log house with a gable roof, central porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a snowy, tree-dotted terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the gable roof structure and the house's placement on the snowy terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, foundation, and additional windows, with trees in the background.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view emphasizing the roof, rear windows, and the slope of the terrain.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a covered porch, supported by posts and accessed by a few steps, featuring simple rustic detailing.
